purpose: Lockbox pre-registration: 5-fold winner gets ONE LOOCV evaluation as headline
protocol: Codex-robustified plan v2; 5-fold screening then single confirmatory LOOCV per target
tiebreaker_rule: highest CCC; ties within 0.01 broken by simplicity (codex #1)

winner_t1.label: inductive_pd (training-fold PD-only ranker; no HC anchors)
winner_t1.why_winner: Highest 5-fold CCC among 16 deployable variants; +0.014 over best non-ranker baseline (B6_shallow_imu CCC=0.654)

winner_t3.label: baseline_B1_v2_only (LightGBM on v2 handcrafted features only)
winner_t3.why_winner: Highest 5-fold CCC. T3 deployment ceiling is essentially noise — IMU-only models barely exceed MAE=8 baseline; demographics ridge gives CCC=0.04. T3 is not a meaningful clinical target from gait IMU alone.

leaked_ceiling_t1.label: transductive (Stage-1 ranker uses test-fold rank label)
leaked_ceiling_t1.note: NOT deployable. Excluded from winner selection. Shown in Table S12 only as the methodological upper bound that motivates the leakage audit.

screening_summary.finding: At N=94 PD, all complex pipelines (SSL ranking, demo stacking, event-aware aggregation, MTL) cluster within 0.02 CCC of the simplest LightGBM baseline. Method complexity does not extract additional signal in this small-sample regime.
